title: May
content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}} {{Month|May}} {{Youmay|the time on Earth|[[Mae-ho Aniseya|Mae, from the Disney+ series ''The Acolyte'']]}} '''May''' is the fifth month of the year in the [[Wikipedia:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]. It has 31 days. The first six ''[[Star Wars]]'' movies were released in May. ==Births & deaths== *'''May 2''' – [[David Ankrum]] is born in 1947. *'''[[May 3]]''' – [[Larry Brandenburg]] is born in 1948. *'''May 3''' – [[Michael Gould]] is born in 1961. *'''May 3''' – [[Anna Rust]] is born in 1995. *'''[[May 4]]''' – [[Paul Gleason]] is born in 1944. *'''May 4''' – [[Alex Lawther]] is born in 1995. *'''[[May 5]]''' – [[Sydney Walker]] is born in 1921. *'''May 5''' – [[David Michelinie]] is born in 1948. *'''May 5''' – [[Richard E. [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] platform in 2002. *'''May 19''' – [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] is released on the [[Wikipedia:Game Boy Color|Game Boy Color]] platform in 1999. ==Events concerning [[Wookieepedia]]== *'''May 1''' – [[:fi:Etusivu|Jedipedia]], the Finnish ''Star Wars'' wiki, is founded in 2007. *'''May 3''' – [[W:c:pt.starwars|Star Wars Wiki em Português]] founded in 2006. ==Other ''[[Star Wars]]'' events== *'''May 3''' – [[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (soundtrack)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'' soundtrack]] in 2005. *'''May 4''' – "Star Wars Day", based on how much "[[May the 4th be with you]]" sounds like "[[May the Force be with you]]." *'''May 12''' – [[Lucasfilm Animation]] launches in 2003. *'''May 13''' – [[Wikipedia:MTV|MTV]] airs an episode of [[Wikipedia:Total Request Live|''Total Request Live'']] featuring the band [[Wikipedia:Good Charlotte|Good Charlotte]] to promote the upcoming [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] in 2005. *'''May 15''' – [[Wikipedia:The New York Times|''The New York Times'']] published the first advertisements for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'']] in 1977, only ten days before its premiere. *'''May 23''' – The three-day celebration [[Starlog Salutes Star Wars|''Starlog'' Salutes ''Star Wars'']], the first officially sanctioned ''[[Star Wars]]'' convention, begins in 1987.
